title: Preview and qualify a local statement
preconditions: A compatible Tally executable is available; the target LEDGER account exists and is active; the source is a readable owner-supplied local file; no adapter support is assumed from its extension alone.
postconditions: No LEDGER mutation occurred; the source is unchanged; one owner-only manifest revision identifies every candidate, exclusion, validation, adapter/contract version, and reconciliation result.
main_flow: 1. The owner or delegated AI Agent Host discovers INGEST operations, supported Format Variants, limits, schemas, and errors. 2. The owner supplies the read-only source path and explicit canonical account identity. 3. INGEST fingerprints the source and detects one supported adapter/version without executing active content. 4. The adapter extracts and normalizes transaction-bearing records under the resolved LEDGER finance semantics. 5. INGEST accounts for non-transaction records, validations, duplicates, and reconciliation evidence. 6. INGEST freezes an immutable Import Manifest revision. 7. INGEST returns a structured preview and creates no LEDGER transaction.
alt_flows: 2a. Source path is unreadable or changes during preview -> return a stable source failure and persist no committable manifest
2b. Statement metadata conflicts with the selected account -> block the batch without inferring another account
3a. No supported Format Variant is detected -> return unsupported-format and no mutation
3b. Password protection, scanning, active content, external references, or resource limits prevent passive bounded parsing -> fail closed
4a. A required amount, currency, date, description, source identity, or row boundary is ambiguous -> block the batch rather than guess
5a. Transaction-bearing records or available source controls do not reconcile -> mark the format/batch uncommittable
metadata: {"depth_tier":3,"primary_actor":"P1","trigger":"The Personal Finance Owner has downloaded a local bank statement for an owned account and wants to import it.","status":"draft"}
